title: Hurun Baidu Index Dataset
text:
本数据仅供学术研究使用，请勿用于商业用途。 This dataset is for academic research purposes only. Not for commercial use.



This dataset contains Baidu Search Index data for the keyword “Hurun” (胡润) across 31 provinces, autonomous regions, and municipalities in China, spanning from January 1, 2011 to December 31, 2025. The data was collected via web scraping using OpenCode.











File
Description
Format




baidu_index_hurun_province_year.dta
Provincial annual panel data (31 provinces × 15 years)
Stata (.dta)



Provincial daily CSV files (31 files): Daily Baidu Index by province, named as 百度指数_胡润_[Province]_20110101_20251231.csv




baidu_index_hurun_province_year.dta

title: 管戴煜
text:
管戴煜，男，中国海洋大学管理学院会计学（ACCA 方向）本科生（2023级）。研究方向为公司治理、国有企业改革与 ESG 表现。中国海洋大学应用会计研究所兼职研究员，从事战略联盟网络与公司行为的实证研究。GRE: V 162 / Q 170 / AW 3.5。

邮箱：gdy6666662021@163.com
地址：山东省青岛市崂山区松岭路238号，中国海洋大学管理学院（邮编：266100）

title: 管戴煜
text:
管戴煜，男，中国海洋大学管理学院会计学（ACCA 方向）本科生（2023级）。研究方向为公司治理、国有企业改革与 ESG 表现。中国海洋大学应用会计研究所兼职研究员，从事战略联盟网络与公司行为的实证研究。GRE: V 162 / Q 170 / AW 3.5。

邮箱：gdy6666662021@163.com
地址：山东省青岛市崂山区松岭路238号，中国海洋大学管理学院（邮编：266100）

title: 管戴煜
text:
教育背景

2023.09 – 2027.06（预计） 中国海洋大学 管理学院 会计学（ACCA方向） 管理学学士

title: 管戴煜
text:
技能

Stata：熟练运用 Stata 进行数据清洗与回归分析，擅长多种稳健性检验方法，包括 PSM、事件研究法、安慰剂检验、工具变量法等，能够独立完成 C 刊标准实证论文的全部实证部分，已有一篇见刊，多篇论文在投及在审。
Python：能够运用 Python 爬取数据、进行数据处理与自动化操作。
OpenCode：擅长使用 OpenCode 批量爬取、下载及处理非结构化数据与文献，效率极高。成果：胡润百度指数（Hurun Baidu Index）——本数据仅供学术研究使用，请勿用于商业用途。
吉他
梅花易数

title: 管戴煜
text:
科研经历

2023.03 – 至今 中国海洋大学应用会计研究所 兼职研究员
参与国家自然科学基金青年项目等课题，负责多源渠道战略联盟公告数据的收集与整理，制定分类方案并确保编码信度，为实证分析提供数据支持。

title: 管戴煜
text:
学术成果

发表论文

马新啸, 殷正香, 黄晓珊, 管戴煜. 产权权利束分割与国有企业 ESG 表现——基于中央企业分红权激励试点的准自然实验[J]. 外国经济与管理, 2025, 47(07): 20-36.



工作论文

Beyond Mixed-Ownership Reform: Strategic Alliances as a Flexible Policy Lever for SOE Innovation. Co-authored with Shuang Wu, Yifan Wu, Xinxiao Ma.
The Effect of Cross-Ownership Strategic Alliances on SOE Investment Efficiency: Evidence from China. Co-authored with Shuang Wu, Yifan Wu, Xinxiao Ma. (Under review at Asia Pacific Journal of Management)
Leadership Discontinuity and Corporate Resilience: Evidence from CEO Turnover Co-authored with Yihan Ding, Dongbin Luo.

title: 管戴煜
text:
荣誉奖励

国家奖学金，教育部，2024
一等奖学金，中国海洋大学，2024

title: Daiyu Guan
text:
Learning To Grow

Email
·
ORCID
I am an undergraduate student at Ocean University of China, majoring in Accounting (ACCA Direction) at the College of Management. My research interests lie in corporate governance, state-owned enterprise (SOE) reform, and ESG performance. I am currently a part-time research fellow at the Institute of Applied Accounting, Ocean University of China, focusing on strategic alliance networks and their impact on corporate behavior.
My work employs empirical methods to examine how institutional arrangements—such as property rights reform and strategic alliances—shape firm outcomes including innovation, investment efficiency, and sustainability practices.

title: Daiyu Guan
text:
Education

B.A. in Accounting (ACCA Direction) | Ocean University of China, College of Management
September 2023 – June 2027 (Expected)
GRE: V 162 / Q 170 / AW 3.5

title: Daiyu Guan
text:
Skills

Stata: Proficient in data cleaning, regression analysis, and various robustness checks including PSM, event study, placebo tests, and instrumental variable estimation. Capable of independently completing all empirical components of CSSCI-standard research papers.
Python: Proficient in web scraping, data processing, and automation using Python.
OpenCode: Skilled in batch web scraping, downloading and processing unstructured data and academic literature with high efficiency. Achievements: Hurun Baidu Index dataset (胡润百度指数) — for academic use only.
Guitar
Plum Blossom Divination

title: Daiyu Guan
text:
Research Experience

Part-time Research Fellow, Institute of Applied Accounting, Ocean University of China
March 2023 – Present
Participated in research projects including the National Natural Science Foundation of China (NSFC) Young Scientists Fund, focusing on strategic alliance announcement data collection, classification, and empirical analysis.

title: Daiyu Guan
text:

First Prize Scholarship, Ocean University of China, 2024
